news.t: Best Leveraged S&P 500 ETFs for Q1 2021

holdings.infoBox: SPUU is an equity ETF with a total of 514 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.14%, Apple at 6.22%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 5.91%, S&P 500 Index Swap at 5.77%, and Microsoft at 4.16%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily S&P 500 Bull 2X ETF (SPUU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund provides 2x daily leveraged exposure to the S&P 500, a market-cap-weighted index of US large-cap stocks selected by S&Ps index committee. SPUU was launched on May 28, 2014 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Best Leveraged S&P 500 ETFs for Q1 2021
data.text: These are the 2X and 3X leveraged S&P 500 ETFs with the lowest fees and most liquidity.
